title: Lets Encrypt
description: Lets Encrypt documents overview material for Lets Encrypt in the infrastructure domain. It is classified as a concept page for the auth-system class, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights 설치, Nginx, certbot, and Renew, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include ssl, certbot, nginx, ssl-lets-encrypt, and infrastructure, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is infrastructure / security / ssl-lets-encrypt / overview, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation. Use it for quick orientation, implementation reminders, and deeper research.
